query:
INSERT INTO `callTypes` (`name`, `slug`, `description`, `durationMinutes`, `price`, `currency`, `isActive`, `color`, `sortOrder`) VALUES
('Exploratory Call', 'exploratory', 'A free 30-minute conversation to understand your infrastructure challenges and see if we are a good fit.', 30, '0.00', 'USD', true, '#10b981', 1),
('Paid Consulting Session', 'paid-consulting', 'A focused 60-minute deep-dive into your specific technical problem. Come with your toughest infrastructure challenge.', 60, '500.00', 'USD', true, '#6366f1', 2),
('Sprint Kickoff', 'sprint-kickoff', 'A 90-minute intensive session to scope and plan your 3-Day Infrastructure Sprint engagement ($15k).', 90, '0.00', 'USD', true, '#f59e0b', 3),
('Advisory Onboarding', 'advisory-onboarding', 'A 60-minute onboarding session for new Fractional CTO Advisory clients ($10k/month retainer).', 60, '0.00', 'USD', true, '#8b5cf6', 4);

INSERT INTO `availability` (`dayOfWeek`, `startTime`, `endTime`, `isActive`, `timezone`) VALUES
(1, '10:00', '17:00', true, 'America/Los_Angeles'),
(2, '10:00', '17:00', true, 'America/Los_Angeles'),
(3, '10:00', '17:00', true, 'America/Los_Angeles'),
(4, '10:00', '17:00', true, 'America/Los_Angeles'),
(5, '10:00', '14:00', true, 'America/Los_Angeles');
